title: olearia rugosa
intro: Olearia rugosa, also known as the woolly daisy or tree daisy, is a flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Olearia rugosa include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against infections. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, and topical applications, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
